reviews.comment:
Nuevas instalaciones, restaurant, muy agradable, descuento a socios. 33 años socio y vecino. Más diversidad en Buffet y merienda. Jugos para diabeticos.

(Translated by Google)
New facilities, restaurant, very pleasant, member discount. Member and neighbor for 33 years. More variety in the buffet and afternoon tea. Juices for diabetics.

reviews.comment:
La reforma quedó espectacular. Renovaron todo. Me atendieron de diez, merendé excelente, precio-calidad destacable. Hay combos de merienda y en caja te atienden de diez. Me dan ganas de volver. La verdad, me sorprendió.

(Translated by Google)
The renovation is spectacular. They updated everything. The service was excellent, the afternoon snack was delicious, and the value for money was outstanding. They have snack combos, and the service at the register is top-notch. I can't wait to go back. Honestly, I was pleasantly surprised.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNWcmVHbF9BRRAB

reviews.comment:

Felicitaciones.

Congratulations.
